'''Chateuse VII''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="GH">''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]''</ref> located in the [[Tungra sector/Legends|Tungra sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The name Chateuse VII appeared in the supplement ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]'' for the Second Edition of [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]], which was published by [[West End Games]]. In the sourcebook, advice was given to players on creating their own adventures, and a simple example was modeled as a sample script. On Chateuse VII, a certain situation had developed, leading to a number of warring factions, and during a briefing on the planet’s affairs, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] reviewed the major factions, their leaders, and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] stance on the situation on Chateuse VII.
